title: Smoky German Runner Bean Stew
description: A hearty and nostalgic German dish featuring charred runner beans in a smoky stew, cooked to perfection in a donabe vessel, low in calories and rich in flavor.

ingredients.name: runner beans
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Heat the donabe vessel over medium heat and char the runner beans for 5 minutes on each side.
Remove the charred runner beans from the donabe and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the donabe and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the donabe and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the smoked paprika and caraway seeds and cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegetable broth, tomato paste, salt, and black pepper to the donabe and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and add the charred runner beans back to the donabe.
Simmer the stew for 20 minutes, or until the runner beans are tender.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
